---
title: "Week 17: Finals Week"
subtitle: "Final Web Portfolio Due"
date: "2026-05-12"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## Final Web Portfolio (250 pts)

**Due: Friday, May 8, 2026 at 11:59 pm**

### Submission Checklist

- [ ] All six sections complete (Abstract, Literature Review, Methodology, Study 1, Study 2, Discussion)
- [ ] All instruction comments deleted from .qmd files
- [ ] `coding_data_clean.RDS` file in project folder
- [ ] `references.bib` updated with your Zotero export
- [ ] `apa.csl` downloaded and in project folder
- [ ] `_quarto.yml` updated with your name, title, and repo URL
- [ ] `quarto render` runs without errors
- [ ] PDF renders correctly — rename to `Lastname_FinalPortfolio.pdf`
- [ ] GitHub Pages site is live and all pages load
- [ ] Tested live URL in private/incognito browser

### Submit to Blackboard

1. Upload: `Lastname_FinalPortfolio.pdf`
2. Paste: Your GitHub Pages URL in the text box
